expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: modern grid banding scenarios distinguish styling variants, interactions, and backward-compatible rendering outcomes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly enumerates the case focus items: "modern grid banding scenarios" distinguishing "1) Styling variants ... 2) Interactions ... 3) Backward-compatible rendering outcomes" and further ties them to BCIN-7231 gaps (color formatting, column banding, header-based banding, Report parity).

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md state Phase 4a alignment cannot be validated due to missing Phase 4a artifacts: "No Phase 4a run artifacts were provided (cannot validate phase4a alignment)" and "Not demonstrably satisfied for Phase 4a... does not include the Phase 4a spawn manifest or the Phase 4a draft artifact to verify alignment."
